body_txt: When a character induces an allergic reaction in themself. Perhaps to get out of a bad situation, to stall for time, or sometimes even by accident. This is usually Played for Laughs . Has surprisingly little to do with *Cough* Snark *Cough* . See also Sick Captive Scam for cases where a person uses a fake injury/illness to get the drop on their captors. Needless to say, allergic reactions are dangerous, so do not try this at home. Or anywhere else, really.
